# WebGL Globe Interactive dotted globe rendered with react-three-fiber — spin, glow, and depth for platform heroes. ## Import ```tsx import { WebGLGlobe } from "@/components/ui/webgl-globe"; ``` ## Usage ```tsx "use client"; "use client"; export default function Hero() { return (

Your headline

); } ``` ## Props - **count** (number) — default: `1500`: Dot count - **color** (string) — default: `"#a855f7"`: Color - **speed** (number) — default: `1`: Speed - **size** (number) — default: `0.025`: Dot size > Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component. Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config. ## Install ```bash npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add webgl-globe # or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init): npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/webgl-globe ```
